items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Monkey D. Luffy.
items.explanation: Monkey D. Luffy is strongly linked to One Piece.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Money Heist?
items.explanation: The Professor is one of the defining characters in Money Heist.

items.q: The character Dolores Abernathy appears in Westworld.
items.explanation: Dolores Abernathy is a key character in Westworld.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Edward Elric.
items.explanation: Edward Elric is strongly linked to Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Mindhunter?
items.explanation: Holden Ford is one of the defining characters in Mindhunter.

items.q: Which tv show features the character Kara Thrace?
items.explanation: Kara Thrace is associated with Battlestar Galactica.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Nucky Thompson.
items.explanation: Nucky Thompson is strongly linked to Boardwalk Empire.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The West Wing?
items.explanation: Josiah Bartlet is one of the defining characters in The West Wing.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Olivia Dunham.
items.explanation: Olivia Dunham is strongly linked to Fringe.

items.q: The character Elizabeth Jennings appears in Veep.
items.explanation: Elizabeth Jennings appears in The Americans, not Veep.
